intro: 100+ locations resort-wide. Live map: My Disney Experience app → Map → filter "PhotoPass" (Mickey head icon). Tan vest + camera = cast member.

items.name: Cinderella Castle
items.desc: Front courtyard, photographer stationed nearly all day.

items.name: Tangled restroom area
items.desc: Fantasyland, hanging lantern backdrop — night only.

items.name: Spaceship Earth
items.desc: Front, all-day coverage. Also Tiny World Magic Shot here.

items.name: World Showcase pavilions
items.desc: Most pavilions have a stationed photographer; fairy wings Magic Shot available World Showcase-wide.

items.name: World Celebration (central planter, Port of Entry)
Toy Story Land / Hollywood Blvd / Sunset Blvd
Pandora – World of Avatar
items.desc: Tiny World Magic Shot. Natural/scenic shots throughout park.

items.name: Disney Springs PhotoPass Studio
items.desc: Marketplace, green-screen/virtual backdrops, no reservation needed.

items.name: Signature Portrait Sessions (2026 new)
items.desc: Grand Floridian or Polynesian, $399/40min, premium resort portraits.

items.name: Ride photos
items.desc: Auto-captured: Space Mountain, Seven Dwarfs Mine Train, Tower of Terror + more. Included w/ Memory Maker or LL Multi Pass.

items.name: Water Parks
items.desc: Typhoon Lagoon, Blizzard Beach — PhotoPass available.
